title: Jamaican Curry Fish
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish with the perfect balance of spices and fish.

ingredients.name: fish
ingredients.notes: firm white fish, such as snapper or tilapia

ingredients.name: curry powder
ingredients.notes: use a mild or medium-hot curry powder, depending on your preference

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a neutral-tasting oil, such as canola or grapeseed

ingredients.name: coconut milk
ingredients.notes: full-fat or low-fat, depending on your preference

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt, such as kosher or Maldon

instructions: Season the fish with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the fish and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the fish to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the coconut milk to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until thickened slightly.
Serve the fish with the curry sauce spooned over the top.
